title: Made In America
summary:
Main
American crude production has gone from strength to strength in recent years, despite a recent slowdown. After a low of 5 mbd in 2008 and worries about the dependency of the US on imports, the shale revolution massively increased production capabilities over the last decade. The EIA saw crude production at 13.5 mbd last week, a new record.
